nodes.bios: What's up! My name is Patrick Tu and I initiated in the fall quarter of my freshman year here at UCI. In my free time, I enjoy all kinds of outdoor activities and a wide variety of music. A fun fact about myself is that I was born in Shanghai, China. Talk to me about ANYTHING at recruitment!
